name: chr22_q11_21_LCR22A_LCR22D
description: NAHR substrate pair LCR22A-LCR22D on 22q11.21. Mediates recurrent CNV (~2621 kb interval) via direct-orientation SD pair. Includes TBX1/COMT/CRKL DGS critical region. Architecture per Edelmann 1999 / Demaerel 2019.

architecture.microhomology_bp_at_breakpoint: varies (typically 100-500 bp within shared LCR22 cores)
architecture.internal_structure: core: TBX1, COMT, CRKL, DGCR8, RANBP1, ZNF74, UFD1L, HIRA, SEPT5 (A-D); variable subset for nested intervals; LCR22 cores share USP18, BCRL, GGTLC, IGLV-pseudo modules

sources: Demaerel et al. 2019 AJHG (LCR22 nomenclature update)
McDonald-McGinn et al. 2015 (22q11.2DS Nat Rev Dis Primers)
